title: Arts and media
explanation:
Arts and media

  • exhibition, critic, masterpiece, censorship, premiere
  • documentary, screenplay, genre, curator, broadcast
  • verbs: perform, publish, review, adapt

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The museum's new ____ features contemporary photography. | *exhibition | election | recession
The film received praise from every major ____. | *critic | witness | defendant
Many consider the novel a literary ____. | *masterpiece | receipt | platform
The ____ of the play attracted celebrities from across Europe. | *premiere | verdict | deadline

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: The director decided to ____ the novel for television. | adapt
The orchestra will ____ live at the festival. | perform
The journalist wrote a detailed ____ of the concert. | review
The channel will ____ the debate tonight. | broadcast
She hopes to ____ her first collection of poems next year. | publish

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The ____ explored the history of protest movements. | *documentary | sentence | bail
He spent months writing the ____. | *screenplay | verdict | mandate
Horror is a popular film ____ worldwide. | *genre | policy | debt
The ____ selected works from emerging artists. | *curator | jury | witness
